items.name: cn
items.title: cn
items.description: Utility for merging Tailwind CSS classes with clsx and tailwind-merge.

items.name: marquee
items.title: Marquee
items.description: An infinite scrolling marquee component with horizontal and vertical support.

items.name: border-beam
items.title: Border Beam
items.description: An animated beam effect that traces along the border of a container.

items.name: retro-grid
items.title: Retro Grid
items.description: A perspective grid background effect with retro aesthetics.

items.name: shimmer-button
items.title: Shimmer Button
items.description: A button with a rotating shimmer light effect.

items.name: dock
items.title: Dock
items.description: A macOS-style dock with magnification effect on hover.

items.name: use-copy-to-clipboard
items.title: useCopyToClipboard
items.description: A hook for copying text to the clipboard with a timeout reset.

items.name: use-mobile
items.title: useIsMobile
items.description: A hook that detects mobile viewport using matchMedia.

items.name: routes-config
items.title: Routes Config
items.description: Centralized route definitions for Shipkit apps.

items.name: features-config
items.title: Features Config
items.description: Build-time feature flag detection based on environment variables.

items.name: faq
items.title: FAQ
items.description: A full FAQ page with accordion layout, CMS integration, and static content fallback.
items.docs: Static FAQ page with accordion UI. Optionally integrates with Payload CMS for dynamic FAQ management.

items.name: docs
items.title: Docs
items.description: Full documentation system with sidebar navigation, search, and MDX rendering.
items.docs: Full docs system powered by MDX. Place your `.mdx` files in `docs/` at the project root. Includes sidebar navigation, search with optional AI-powered answers, and responsive layout.

items.name: blog
items.title: Blog
items.description: Complete blog system with MDX posts, author profiles, categories, sidebar, and feed-style timeline layout.
items.docs: MDX-powered blog with author profiles, categories, feed-style timeline, and sidebar navigation. Place `.mdx` posts in `src/content/blog/`. Add `withBlog()` to your `next.config.ts` to auto-detect blog content.

items.name: builder-io
items.title: Builder.io
items.description: Visual page builder integration with Builder.io for no-code content editing.
items.docs: Visual page builder powered by Builder.io. Sign up at builder.io, add your `BUILDER_API_KEY` to `.env`, and wrap your Next.js config with `withBuilderConfig()`. Create pages visually in the Builder.io dashboard.

items.name: cms-pages
items.title: CMS Pages
items.description: Shared catch-all route that renders dynamic pages from Payload CMS and/or Builder.io with automatic fallback.
items.docs: Shared CMS catch-all route. Checks Payload CMS first, then falls back to Builder.io. Both CMS systems coexist on the same URL space. Requires `features-config` to detect which CMS is enabled via env vars. Install `builder-io` block for Builder.io support and/or configure Payload CMS separately.

items.name: auth
items.title: Auth
items.description: Full authentication system with NextAuth.js v5, multi-provider OAuth, credentials, magic link, and guest access.
items.docs: Full auth system with NextAuth.js v5. Run `npx auth secret` to generate `AUTH_SECRET`. Configure at least one OAuth provider (e.g. `AUTH_GITHUB_ID` + `AUTH_GITHUB_SECRET`) or enable guest access with `ENABLE_AUTH_GUEST=true`. Requires a database — set `DATABASE_URL` and run Drizzle migrations.

items.name: legal
items.title: Legal Pages
items.description: Legal pages with privacy policy, terms of service, EULA, and legal information — all in MDX with shared layout and header navigation.
items.docs: Legal pages (privacy policy, terms of service, EULA, legal info) with MDX content and shared layout. Customize the content in each `.mdx` file after installation.

items.name: changelog
items.title: Changelog
items.description: Auto-generated changelog from GitHub commits and tags with timeline view and individual entry pages.
items.docs: Auto-generated changelog from your GitHub repo's commits and tags. Set `GITHUB_REPO_OWNER` and `GITHUB_REPO_NAME` env vars (defaults to lacymorrow/shipkit). Optionally set `GITHUB_TOKEN` for higher API rate limits.

items.name: contact
items.title: Contact
items.description: Contact page with animated background, email card, and contact form with Resend email integration and newsletter opt-in.
items.docs: Contact page with form that sends emails via Resend. Set `RESEND_API_KEY` to enable email delivery. The form includes name, contact info, message, and optional newsletter opt-in.

items.name: waitlist
items.title: Waitlist
items.description: Pre-launch waitlist with signup form, hero section, social proof, FAQ, database storage, and Resend email notifications.
items.docs: Pre-launch waitlist page with email signup, social proof, and FAQ. Requires a database (`DATABASE_URL`) for storing entries. Optionally set `RESEND_API_KEY` for confirmation emails.

items.name: admin
items.title: Admin Dashboard
items.description: Role-based admin panel with user management, payments, GitHub repos, integrations, feedback, waitlist, and CMS admin sections.
items.docs: Role-based admin dashboard. Set `ADMIN_EMAIL` (comma-separated) to grant admin access by email. Requires auth block for session management and database for user/role queries.

items.name: settings
items.title: Settings
items.description: User settings pages with profile, appearance, account management, sidebar navigation, and server actions for profile/theme updates.
items.docs: User settings with profile editing, appearance/theme picker, account deletion, and provider disconnect. Requires auth block for session management and database for persisting changes.

items.name: demo
items.title: Demo Pages
items.description: Showcase demo pages with UI examples including dashboard, mail, music, playground, forms, cards, authentication, file browser, and more.
items.docs: Demo showcase pages with 10+ UI examples: dashboard, mail client, music player, AI playground, forms, cards, file browser, authentication, pricing, landing page, and tRPC integration.

items.name: email
items.title: Email
items.description: Resend email integration with client setup, subscribe/audience actions, email service, and newsletter form component.
items.docs: Email integration via Resend. Set `RESEND_API_KEY` to enable. Optionally set `RESEND_AUDIENCE_ID` for newsletter audience management. Includes subscribe form component and email utility functions.

items.name: feedback
items.title: Feedback
items.description: User feedback system with dialog and popover components, server actions, and database-backed feedback service.
items.docs: User feedback collection with dialog and popover UI. Stores feedback in the database and optionally emails it via Resend. Requires `DATABASE_URL` for storage.

items.name: analytics
items.title: Analytics
items.description: Multi-provider analytics with PostHog, Umami, DataFast, Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and Statsig — all behind feature flags.
items.docs: Multi-provider analytics. Each provider auto-enables via env vars: `NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY` (PostHog), `NEXT_PUBLIC_UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID` (Umami), `NEXT_PUBLIC_DATAFAST_ID` (DataFast), `NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID` (Google Analytics), `NEXT_PUBLIC_GTM_ID` (GTM), `NEXT_PUBLIC_STATSIG_CLIENT_KEY` (Statsig). Add `<AnalyticsProvider />` to your root layout.

items.name: caching
items.title: Caching & Rate Limiting
items.description: Redis-based caching and rate limiting via Upstash with configurable per-route limits.
items.docs: Redis caching and rate limiting via Upstash. Set `UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL` and `UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN` to enable. Configure per-route rate limits in `config/rate-limits.ts`.

items.name: storage
items.title: Storage
items.description: File storage with AWS S3 presigned uploads, file service, server actions, and upload components.
items.docs: File storage via AWS S3 with presigned URL uploads. Set `AWS_S3_BUCKET_NAME`, `AWS_S3_REGION`, `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID`, and `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY`. Includes file upload components and server actions for managing uploads.

items.name: pricing
items.title: Pricing
items.description: Pricing page with plan cards, features showcase, testimonials, and static content data files.
items.docs: Pricing page with plan cards and feature comparison. Customize plans in `content/pricing/pricing-content.ts`, features in `content/features/features-content.ts`, and testimonials in `content/testimonials/testimonials-content.ts`.

items.name: payments
items.title: Payments
items.description: Unified payment system with Stripe, Lemon Squeezy, and Polar providers — checkout flows, webhook handlers, and subscription management.
items.docs: Unified payment system supporting Stripe, Lemon Squeezy, and Polar. Each provider auto-enables via env vars: `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY` + `STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY` (Stripe), `LEMONSQUEEZY_API_KEY` + `LEMONSQUEEZY_STORE_ID` (Lemon Squeezy), `POLAR_ACCESS_TOKEN` (Polar). Includes webhook handlers, checkout flows, and subscription management. Requires `DATABASE_URL` for storing payment records.
